major_flags: Prior art: Roopin 2013 studied melatonin + Symbiodinium + NPQ
Direct ROS scavenging mass balance: 0.04% of OH — negligible at physiological concentrations
minor_flags: No known melatonin receptor in dinoflagellates
ASMT gene not confirmed in Symbiodiniaceae specifically
passes: Exogenous antioxidant bleaching mitigation has precedent (zeaxanthin)
Indirect mechanisms (NPQ, enzyme induction) viable at signaling concentrations
generator_constraints: Must cite Roopin 2013 — melatonin-Symbiodinium NPQ is not novel
Must NOT use direct ROS scavenging as primary mechanism
Must focus on thermal stress + bleaching intervention angle
